test_cases:
[
  {
    "testCaseId": "TC_NR_LBO_001",
    "title": "Establish New PDU Session in Non-Roaming Scenario with Valid Parameters",
    "description": "Verify that a UE can successfully establish a new PDU Session in a non-roaming scenario with valid S-NSSAI, DNN, and Request Type 'Initial request'.",
    "preconditions": [
      "UE is registered on AMF (non-emergency registered).",
      "UE provides valid S-NSSAI from Allowed NSSAI and valid requested DNN.",
      "Network supports the requested DNN and S-NSSAI."
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "UE generates a new PDU Session ID and sends NAS Message with PDU Session Establishment Request including S-NSSAI(s), UE Requested DNN, PDU Session ID, and Request Type set to 'Initial request'.",
      "AMF receives NAS message and verifies the S-NSSAI and DNN validity.",
      "AMF selects appropriate SMF and sends Nsmf_PDUSession_CreateSMContext Request with received parameters.",
      "SMF retrieves Session Management Subscription data.",
      "SMF validates UE request against subscription and local policy.",
      "SMF selects SSC mode and UPF(s), allocates IP address/prefix if applicable.",
      "SMF establishes N4 Session(s) with UPF(s).",
      "SMF sends Nsmf_PDUSession_CreateSMContext Response with SM Context ID and N1 SM container (PDU Session Establishment Accept).",
      "AMF sends Namf_Communication_N1N2MessageTransfer with PDU Session Establishment Accept to UE.",
      "UE receives PDU Session Establishment Accept and establishes PDU Session."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "PDU Session is successfully established with allocated IP address/prefix if applicable.",
      "AMF, SMF, and UE store session context with correct parameters.",
      "N1 and N2 messages are exchanged successfully without errors.",
      "UE can start data transfer over the new PDU Session."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Capture and verify NAS messages exchanged between UE and AMF.",
      "Monitor Nsmf_PDUSession_CreateSMContext Request and Response messages between AMF and SMF.",
      "Verify UPF session establishment and IP allocation logs.",
      "Check UE logs for PDU Session Establishment Accept reception and IP configuration."
    ],
    "category": ["POSITIVE TESTING", "INTEGRATION TESTING"]
  },
  {
    "testCaseId": "TC_NR_LBO_002",
    "title": "Establish PDU Session for Emergency Services with Request Type 'Emergency Request'",
    "description": "Verify that UE can establish a PDU Session for Emergency services with Request Type set to 'Emergency Request' and no S-NSSAI or DNN provided by UE.",
    "preconditions": [
      "UE is registered as Emergency Registered (limited service).",
      "No existing Emergency PDU Session is established."
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "UE initiates PDU Session Establishment Request with Request Type set to 'Emergency Request' and without S-NSSAI and DNN values.",
      "AMF ignores UE provided S-NSSAI and DNN, uses locally configured emergency values.",
      "AMF selects appropriate SMF for Emergency services.",
      "SMF selects UPF and SSC mode 1 for emergency PDU Session.",
      "SMF proceeds with PDU Session establishment as per emergency service procedures.",
      "SMF sends PDU Session Establishment Accept to UE via AMF."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "Emergency PDU Session is established successfully without UE provided S-NSSAI and DNN.",
      "AMF and SMF use locally configured values for emergency services.",
      "PDU Session Establishment Accept message includes emergency service parameters."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Monitor NAS messages for absence of S-NSSAI and DNN.",
      "Check AMF and SMF logs for selection of emergency service parameters.",
      "Verify UE receives PDU Session Establishment Accept for Emergency PDU Session."
    ],
    "category": ["POSITIVE TESTING", "SECURITY TESTING", "INTEGRATION TESTING"]
  },
  {
    "testCaseId": "TC_NR_LBO_003",
    "title": "Reject PDU Session Establishment Request with Invalid Requested DNN",
    "description": "Verify that the AMF rejects the PDU Session Establishment Request when the UE requested DNN is not supported by the network and not included in the Subscribed DNN List.",
    "preconditions": [
      "UE is registered and requests PDU Session establishment with unsupported or invalid DNN."
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "UE sends NAS Message with PDU Session Establishment Request including invalid or unsupported requested DNN.",
      "AMF verifies requested DNN against subscription and operator policies.",
      "AMF determines that DNN is not supported and not indicated for replacement.",
      "AMF rejects NAS Message with appropriate cause."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "AMF sends PDU Session Establishment Reject to UE with cause indicating unsupported DNN.",
      "No PDU Session is established.",
      "No SMF selection or SM context creation is performed."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Capture NAS messages and verify rejection cause.",
      "Check AMF logs for proper rejection handling.",
      "Confirm no SMF context was created for the invalid request."
    ],
    "category": ["NEGATIVE TESTING", "SECURITY TESTING"]
  },
  {
    "testCaseId": "TC_NR_LBO_004",
    "title": "Reject PDU Session Establishment from Emergency Registered UE with Non-Emergency Request Type",
    "description": "Verify that the AMF rejects a PDU Session Establishment Request from an Emergency Registered UE when Request Type is neither 'Emergency Request' nor 'Existing Emergency PDU Session'.",
    "preconditions": [
      "UE is Emergency Registered (limited service).",
      "UE sends PDU Session Establishment Request with Request Type other than 'Emergency Request' or 'Existing Emergency PDU Session'."
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "UE sends NAS Message with PDU Session Establishment Request and invalid Request Type for emergency registered UE.",
      "AMF verifies UE registration status and Request Type.",
      "AMF rejects the request with appropriate cause."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "AMF sends PDU Session Establishment Reject message to UE.",
      "No PDU Session is established.",
      "SMF is not involved."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Capture NAS rejection message and cause.",
      "Verify AMF logs for correct enforcement of emergency registration policy."
    ],
    "category": ["NEGATIVE TESTING", "SECURITY TESTING"]
  },
  {
    "testCaseId": "TC_NR_LBO_005",
    "title": "PDU Session Establishment with Alternative S-NSSAI Provided by UE",
    "description": "Verify that when UE provides both S-NSSAI and Alternative S-NSSAI, the AMF validates and processes them correctly.",
    "preconditions": [
      "UE is registered and allowed to use S-NSSAI with Alternative S-NSSAI mapping.",
      "UE includes both S-NSSAI and Alternative S-NSSAI in PDU Session Establishment Request."
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "UE sends NAS Message with PDU Session Establishment Request including both S-NSSAI and Alternative S-NSSAI.",
      "AMF verifies validity of both S-NSSAI and Alternative S-NSSAI based on UE context.",
      "AMF selects SMF based on Alternative S-NSSAI as applicable.",
      "AMF forwards both S-NSSAI and Alternative S-NSSAI to SMF.",
      "SMF includes S-NSSAI and Alternative S-NSSAI in PDU Session Establishment Accept."
    ],
    "expectedResults": [
      "PDU Session establishment proceeds successfully with both S-NSSAI and Alternative S-NSSAI recognized.",
      "SMF and AMF store and handle both S-NSSAI values appropriately.",
      "UE receives PDU Session Establishment Accept including both S-NSSAI and Alternative S-NSSAI."
    ],
    "commandsUsed": [],
    "verificationMethods": [
      "Check NAS messages for correct inclusion of both S-NSSAI values.",
      "Verify AMF and SMF logs for processing and forwarding of both S-NSSAI values.",
      "Confirm UE receives correct PDU Session Establishment Accept."
    ],
    "category": ["POSITIVE TESTING", "INTEGRATION TESTING"]
  },
  {
    "testCaseId": "TC_NR_LBO_006",
    "title": "PDU Session Establishment Request with Old PDU Session ID for SSC Mode 3 Operation",
    "description": "Verify that UE includes Old PDU Session ID in PDU Session Establishment Request when switching SSC mode 3 and that AMF and SMF process this correctly.",
    "preconditions": [
      "UE has an ongoing PDU Session with SSC mode 3.",
      "UE initiates PDU Session Establishment for the same DN with new PDU Session ID."
    ],
    "testSteps": [
      "UE sends NAS Message
